tests.name: governance-lock-check
tests.command: export SPRINT_CODE=S96 && export PS_WORK_PRODUCING=1 && make -C ps-dev governance-lock-check

notes: Governance preflight is required before any work-producing run: export SPRINT_CODE=S96, export PS_WORK_PRODUCING=1, then make -C ps-dev governance-lock-check.
project_root vs bridge_root separation is mandatory: governed evidence writes under project_root; scratch/caches/logs remain under bridge_root.
Covered metric families for Sprint 96 v1 are operate, chronicle, rc, parity, and incidents; lint applies only to families declared in .planestack/governance/metrics/ownership.json.

No new overlapping metrics endpoints are allowed; sprint96-validate must fail if a new endpoint overlaps covered metric scopes. Only extension of GET /api/v1/ou/:ouKey/p/:projectKey/metrics is allowed; /chronicle/metrics/overview remains alias-only.
UI smoke proof artifact .planestack/governance/evidence/s96/reporting/ui-sot-smoke.json must include route_tested, requests_observed(method/path), series_count, and no_data_state where applicable.
Compare/export artifact ids use deterministic format YYYYMMDDThhmmssZ_<6-8hex>.
Sprint 96 is an enforcement-and-expansion sprint over the Sprint 95 reporting substrate, not a new reporting architecture sprint.
Canonical metrics endpoint remains GET /api/v1/ou/:ouKey/p/:projectKey/metrics; /chronicle/metrics/overview remains alias-only.
Ownership remains governed by the single canonical file .planestack/governance/metrics/ownership.json.
Compare/export are Chronicle-owned operations and must produce evidence-grade artifacts with source_refs and integrity using the S95 hash rule.
UI aggregation is forbidden for covered metric families; lint and UI smoke proof are required.
sprint96-validate and e2e-gate are both required and remain independent.
Non-blocking infra observation: e2e clean-slate emitted transient docker compose cleanup noise (volume/network still in use) but gate completed successfully.
